text: ‘The first people who came to us (in Medina) were Mus'ab bin “Umar and Ibn Um Maktum who were teaching Qur'an to the people. Then their came Bilal. Sad and “Ammar bin Yasir. After that Umar bin Al- Khattab came along with twenty ather companions of the Prophet. Later on the Prophet () himself (to Medina) and | had never seen the people of Medina 50 joyful as they were on the arrival of Allah's Apostie, for even the slave girls were saying, *Allah’s Messenger (&) has arrived!® And before his arrival | had read the Sura starting with:- - *Glorify the Name of your Lord, the Most High® (87.1) together with other Suras of AMufassal. oS . Sahih al-Bukhari 3925
